Friendly home technology support

Simple help for the technology in your home

HomeTechCare helps homeowners with Wi-Fi, smart devices, streaming, Ring, Nest, and everyday tech problems. Clear answers, patient support, and local help when you need it.

Schedule a Free Tech Check View Plans
✔ Patient support ✔ No confusing tech talk ✔ Serving Vancouver, WA
If it plugs in or connects to Wi-Fi, we can help.

Support you can trust

Help with setup, troubleshooting, and understanding the devices in your home.

Wi-Fi & mesh network setup
Ring, Nest & smart home devices
Streaming TV & app support
Phone, video, and local on-site help

What we help with

We focus on the everyday technology problems that frustrate homeowners and families most.

📶

Wi-Fi & Internet Help

Router setup, mesh Wi-Fi, dead spots, slow internet troubleshooting, and device connection issues.

🔔

Smart Devices

Ring, Nest, cameras, thermostats, doorbells, smart plugs, and app setup.

📺

TV & Streaming

Smart TVs, Roku, Fire TV, streaming apps, login help, and making everything easier to use.

🔐

Accounts & Passwords

Help with account setup, password resets, device sign-ins, and organizing access to your apps.

👵

Senior-Friendly Support

Calm, patient guidance without jargon. We make home technology less stressful and more usable.

🛠️

Ongoing Tech Care

Instead of figuring it out alone every time, you have someone to call when things stop working.

How it works

Simple, clear support without pressure or confusing technical language.

1

Tell us what’s going on

Call, email, or request a free 15-minute tech check and describe the problem.

2

Get a simple plan

We explain the issue in plain English and recommend the easiest next step.

3

Get help your way

We support you by phone, video call, or local on-site assistance when appropriate.

Simple pricing

Start with one-time help, or choose a monthly plan for ongoing support and peace of mind.

Basic Support

$29 / month

  • Phone and video support
  • Help with Wi-Fi, apps, and devices
  • Simple troubleshooting and guidance
Most Popular

Standard Care

$59 / month

  • Everything in Basic
  • Priority response
  • Smart device setup guidance
  • Annual virtual home tech check

Premium Care

$99 / month

  • Everything in Standard
  • Two local in-home visits per year
  • Discounted additional visits
  • Personalized device recommendations
One-time local service call: $95 — applied toward a monthly plan if you join.

Great for seniors. Reassuring for families.

HomeTechCare is designed for people who want a trusted, ongoing source of help with home technology.

Patient, calm support

We explain things clearly, move at your pace, and focus on making devices easier to use.

Peace of mind for adult children

If a parent or loved one struggles with technology, we can be the person they call for help.

Local and personal

Based around real support, not one-time transactions. The goal is to become your go-to home tech helper.

Need help today?

Start with a free 15-minute tech check. We’ll listen, explain the issue clearly, and suggest the simplest next step.

Email Us Call (360) 555-1234
Phone: (360) 555-1234
Email: hello@hometechcare.us
Service Area: Vancouver, WA and nearby communities

HomeTechCare provides technology setup assistance, education, and support. We do not perform licensed electrical work.
